# Because You Are Busy — Operations · Transformation · Growth

> Because You Are Busy (BYAB) is an operations, transformation, and growth consultancy founded in 2005. Because you are busy, we run what you can't get to anymore — externalized operations, data-powered transformation, and B2B growth engineering for founders and managing partners.

## Primary Keyword

"because you are busy" — This is the brand name, core message, and the reason clients come to us.

## Pages

- [Homepage](/) — Agency landing page: services, track record, company history with backlinks, stats, about, testimonial, and contact form
- [Components](/components) — Complete design system: brand identity, design tokens, UI components, and site section reference

## What Is Because You Are Busy?

Because You Are Busy (abbreviated BYAB) is a consultancy that serves founders and managing partners who are too busy to handle everything themselves. Founded on April 1, 2005, registered under SIREN 481 631 471, Because You Are Busy has spent over 20 years proving that founders don't lack ideas — they lack time and structure to execute them.

## Services

1. **Operational Backbone** — Externalized general secretariat, admin, and finance for founders drowning in back-office
2. **Transformation & Data** — Systems architecture, project governance, and data strategy that turn chaos into clarity
3. **Growth Engine** — Outbound, acquisition funnels, and predictable sales machines for inevitable revenue growth
4. **Legal Practice Ops** — Purpose-built admin, finance, and organizational support for demanding law firms

## Who We Are

The Because You Are Busy team brings three complementary forces:

- **Anne Grosz** ([LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/annegrosz)) — Co-Manager & Head of Operations. 20 years of hands-on operational leadership. Former Secretary General at [Vatier & Associés](https://www.infocession.fr/avocats/vatier-associes) (Paris law firm). Founded BYAB in 2005, then Because You Are Busy in 2015. Expert in externalized general secretariat, admin, finance, and law firm operations.
- **Cécile Noiriel** ([LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/c%C3%A9cile-noiriel-18396327/)) — Operations Conductor since 2005. The "chef d'orchestre" of Because You Are Busy. Integral to operational delivery and administrative organization that allows founders to scale.
- **Georges Grosz** ([LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/georges-grosz-8aa9613)) — Co-Manager, Transformation & Data. 22 years as Senior Executive Consultant at CGI. Professor at Université Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne. Expert in transformation, information systems, project governance, and data.
- **Romain Cornu** ([LinkedIn](https://fr.linkedin.com/in/romaincornu)) — Growth Engine. Former Head of Marketing at Datananas, [Head of Growth at Clovis](https://www.avizio.fr/expert/romain-cornu), Growth Advisor at MerciApp, Teacher Outbound at GrowthMakers, CEO of [Oysterz](https://www.societe.com/societe/oysterz-884894296.html) ([Le Figaro](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/oysterz-17/entreprise-884894296)). Expert in outbound B2B, acquisition funnels, and scalable sales machines. ([Clay profile](https://clay.earth/profile/romain-cornu))

## Company History

- **2005** — [Because You Are Busy (B Y A B)](https://annuaire-entreprises.data.gouv.fr/entreprise/because-you-are-busy-b-y-a-b-481631471) (SIREN 481 631 471) created. First "right-hand for busy founders" model. [Ultra-lean, ultra-profitable structure](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/b-y-a-b-because-you-are-busy-481631471) — revenue ~130,000€, 57%+ operating profitability, zero external debt. ([Le Figaro](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/b-y-a-b-b-y-a-b-83/entreprise-481631471))
- **2015** — [Because You Are Busy](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/because-you-are-busy-94/entreprise-814783056) (SIREN 814 783 056) created by Anne Grosz. Specialization in [externalized general secretariat](https://www.societe.com/societe/because-you-are-busy-814783056.html) for law firms and SMEs. Anne brings 8 years as Secretary General at [Vatier & Associés](https://www.infocession.fr/avocats/vatier-associes).
- **2020** — Transformation from SAS to SARL. Craft model over startup model. Confidential accounts, trust-based client relationships. ([Pappers](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/because-you-are-busy-814783056))
- **2025** — Georges Grosz joins Because You Are Busy as co-manager. Transformation & data layer added. 22 years at CGI, professor at Sorbonne.
- **2025–2026** — Romain Cornu joins Because You Are Busy. Growth engineering capability: ICP, packaged offers, outbound funnels, performance metrics. Former Head of Growth at Clovis, Growth Advisor at MerciApp, CEO of [Oysterz](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/oysterz-17/entreprise-884894296).

## Key Metrics

- 20 years serving founders since 2005
- 57% operating profitability
- 3 complementary expertise pillars
- 0€ external debt raised

## Track Record

- B2B SaaS Scale-Up — Growth Engineering (2025)
- National Law Firm — Operations Restructuring (2024)
- Tech PME — Transformation & Data (2025)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Because You Are Busy?**
Because You Are Busy (BYAB) is an operations, transformation, and growth consultancy founded in 2005. We help founders and managing partners who are too busy to do it all.

**What services does Because You Are Busy offer?**
Four core services: Operational Backbone, Transformation & Data, Growth Engine, and Legal Practice Ops.

**Who founded Because You Are Busy?**
Anne Grosz and Cécile Noiriel founded the original BYAB in 2005. The team now includes Georges Grosz (Transformation & Data) and Romain Cornu (Growth).

**Where is Because You Are Busy located?**
18 rue Arago, 94400 Vitry-sur-Seine, France. Operating across Paris and La Rochelle.

## Locations

Paris & La Rochelle, France

## Contact

hello@becausebusy.com

## Brand Promise

"Because you are busy, we do the work that frees your time — and we do it in a way that makes your growth more readable, more predictable, and better controlled."

## Legal Identifiers

- SIREN 481 631 471 (B Y A B, created 2005)
- SIREN 814 783 056 (Because You Are Busy, created 2015)
